KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_FUSION_MATERIAL: 选择要融入主体的材料构件
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_COMPONENT_TO_SCRAP: 选择要转化为废料的构件
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_REPLACEMENT: 选择要转化为万能原料的牌
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_DECOMPOSE: 选择要分解的原料或废料
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_UPGRADE: 选择要标准升级的构件
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_FILTER_DISCARD: 选择要弃置的牌；取消以结束
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_BLUEPRINT: 选择要架设的机械蓝图
